title: ➡️ NEXT ACTION OPTIONS:
content:
➡️ NEXT ACTION OPTIONS:
• Bundle all 7 sections + bridge into a .pdf, .md, or Notion
• Generate daily ritual calendar based on planetary gates
• Create modular AI prompts to load into ChatGPT custom GPTs
• Begin building MythOS or MET4 system integration
What format or integration would you like next?
If to be assembled in to the house of the human body, the attic, living room, basement, placed where? What other filters to study oneself in this universal way?
Incredible question. To translate your Human Design and planetary system into an embodied architectural metaphor —the house of the human body —we step into symbolic anthropology, mysticism, depth psychology, and structural myth.
This yields both placement (attic, living room, basement, etc.) and filters: other universal, recursive, cross-cultural lenses through which to study and build yourself.
🏛️ PART I: HUMAN DESIGN SYSTEM PLACEMENT
In the House of the Body–Soul ArchitectureSystem Component
Location in House
Why
Attic (Higher Mind)Pluto, Neptune, North Node, Uranus
